testcase.name: Create, Get and Delete object
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Create, Get and Delete object # src/test/resources/features/object.feature:3 Given a "Apple MacBook Pro 16" item is created # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.setName(java.lang.String) And the CPU model is "Intel Core i9" # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.setCPU(java.lang.String) And has a price of "1849.99" # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.setPrice(java.lang.String) Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.restful-api.dev/objects Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "data": { "year": 2024, "price": 1849.99, "CPU model": "Intel Core i9" }, "name": "Apple MacBook Pro 16" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 03:35:57 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=dEnzYVSy9YkOB1ZiNt4WR4tjxNd48Ym6hXVzSrRHmWXBXyNF%2FGE4Rn2bn7IvrzYypQ9oUhjs2XfraYdCyE0FwdThLhFNKAZNT2o3kP1h8k8%2BSXfMPxwiFuXC%2FBc2HwANiiLwQjM9"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e339674e8762e9f-HYD alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": "ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29", "name": "Apple MacBook Pro 16", "createdAt": 1774668957009, "data": { "year": 2024, "price": 1849.99, "CPU model": "Intel Core i9" } } When the request to add the item is made # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.createObject() Then a 200 response code is returned # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.validateStatus() And a "Apple MacBook Pro 16" is created # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.validateName(java.lang.String) Request method: GET Request URI: https://api.restful-api.dev/objects/ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 03:35:58 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=GCPyiaRt1JiM8a1OmXjTR%2FnL9yd94o6lCQ5R%2F%2BmK2PPmDUV9kZ8vGhR8nINJitkmC%2F1NCbOeojlS399sAu8NUY03R0Rpznjo6dK4NAh37oCelPbnOdtYWIzDjFMogQSKVfIheJf4"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e33967becec2e8b-HYD alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": "ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29", "name": "Apple MacBook Pro 16", "data": { "year": 2024, "price": 1849.99, "CPU model": "Intel Core i9" } } When user retrieves the created object # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.getObject() Then response contains correct name # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.validateGet() Request method: DELETE Request URI: https://api.restful-api.dev/objects/ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 03:35:58 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=8%2BZPruwhaQpr%2BdaS3NWErk6ONlb9oDaoryt7JIpPnflfFUxTX766Npvg3NieAfH9qo5oWJQeVb0l%2FJLwguM4vRgQO0gsmMqS4kiGPOrQupccGmqr72X9GeFQ6Vn2q4jY7vBSs%2BEv"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e33967f2d4fd11e-HYD alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "message": "Object with id = ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29 has been deleted." } When user deletes the object # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.deleteObject() Then response code should be 200 # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.response_code_should_be(java.lang.Integer) Request method: GET Request URI: https://api.restful-api.dev/objects/ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 03:35:59 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=u3dS7T%2B3PLoisejgdszDuFHEtfMR9bfEsL2A5LkNsEWt6LIE%2BD0jhQ2PnlmCq%2FNcoMrCzBvBOB6%2Fjw%2Fa0gJwfmiqdx1I%2FGGEQBgXqm1QllGxXFemWKjkXHkG9RFE6pdU8FXKQIU4"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e33968198fb2b45-HYD alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Object with id=ff8081819d150699019d328345513a29 was not found." } When user retrieves the deleted object # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.getDeletedObject() Then response code should be 404 # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.response_code_should_be(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: Get invalid object
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Get invalid object # src/test/resources/features/object.feature:21 Request method: GET Request URI: https://api.restful-api.dev/objects/invalid123 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 03:35:59 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=KhrcrVznKBfI7eWyVtqNH5em%2Bygk2n3mlBwAxzRDTZW2YCEl2y3w8AKZx6BbPp28n%2Bb%2FWT8CND6CVq9iHVPJv6NNQFWGtQNqQtbls7jC7VwG8s0TeecHzqwHov65Xgwow1Ed6sUO"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e3396844ed02e99-HYD alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Object with id=invalid123 was not found." } When user retrieves object with invalid id # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.getInvalidObject() Then response code should be 404 # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.response_code_should_be(java.lang.Integer)

testcase.name: Create object with missing name
Create object using authenticated API
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Create object using authenticated API # src/test/resources/features/object.feature:29 Given a "Authenticated MacBook" item is created # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.setName(java.lang.String) And the CPU model is "M2" # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.setCPU(java.lang.String) And has a price of "2500" # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.setPrice(java.lang.String) Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.restful-api.dev/objects Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "data": { "year": 2024, "price": 2500.0, "CPU model": "M2" }, "name": "Authenticated MacBook" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 03:36:00 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Vary: Origin Vary: Access-Control-Request-Method Vary: Access-Control-Request-Headers X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate Pragma: no-cache Expires: 0 X-Frame-Options: DENY cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=4LL%2BQubg2Ab7M6rFektLDJfAUhYnR7ZFq0Ki9tIRAd47QN1KiiyihWxmLc24eVYkaaOeDGzDyKOMGsgTOiWYJXF1IOJd7IQ7M%2Fv%2BSwyBkUHtDJElCrPCeE%2BSIEnff7e5tJNluqNb"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e339688dce12e8d-HYD alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": "ff8081819d150699019d328351c43a2b", "name": "Authenticated MacBook", "createdAt": 1774668960196, "data": { "year": 2024, "price": 2500.0, "CPU model": "M2" } } When the request to add the item is made # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.createObject() Then a 200 response code is returned # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.validateStatus() And a "Authenticated MacBook" is created # stepdefinitions.ObjectSteps.validateName(java.lang.String)
